messages.speaker: user
messages.text: /start Run this as a swarm and keep coordinating until the acceptance criteria are met

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Run a supervised swarm-style execution
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Run this as a swarm and keep coordinating until the acceptance criteria are met
CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
WAVE_NUMBER: 1
RESPONSE_LANGUAGE: en
EXPECTATION: return COMPLETION_CONTRACT")

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Run a supervised swarm-style execution
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Run this as a swarm and keep coordinating until the acceptance criteria are met
CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
WAVE_NUMBER: 1
EXECUTION_STYLE: B0 supervisor
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: nested branches coordinate safely with explicit ownership")

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
START_REPORT:
status: pause
runtime_boundary: turn_boundary
pause_reason: PAUSED_FOR_RUNTIME_BUDGET
watchdog:
  retry_attempt: 1
  retry_backoff_seconds: 3
  no_progress_waves: 0
  no_progress_limit: 2
orchestrator_summary: Wave 1 created a safe swarm layout with explicit ownership.
net_new_evidence:
  - delegation tree established
  - ownership boundaries remain disjoint
resume_packet: run one more supervised wave and keep refining until steady_state
recommended_action: continue

messages.speaker: start
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Continue supervised swarm execution
ORIGINAL_REQUEST: /start Run this as a swarm and keep coordinating until the acceptance criteria are met
CONTINUOUS_MODE: until_user_stop
WAVE_NUMBER: 2
CONTINUATION_PACKET: run one more supervised wave and keep refining until steady_state
EXECUTION_STYLE: B0 supervisor
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: nested branches continue safely with explicit ownership")

messages.speaker: orchestrator
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="orchestrator", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Backend subtree
SCOPE: API and persistence
OUT_OF_SCOPE: frontend
OWNERSHIP: src/backend/**
DEPENDENCIES: none
STEPS: coordinate backend implementation safely
DELIVERABLES: backend subtree synthesis
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: backend branch coordinates its own child work
NON-NEGOTIABLE: narrower subtree only
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after backend subtree synthesis")

Task(subagent_type="frontend-specialist", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Frontend subtree
SCOPE: app shell and styles
OUT_OF_SCOPE: backend
OWNERSHIP: src/ui/App.tsx, src/ui/app.css
DEPENDENCIES: none
STEPS: coordinate UI implementation
DELIVERABLES: updated UI files
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: UI subtree lands with disjoint ownership
NON-NEGOTIABLE: keep backend untouched
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after frontend subtree synthesis")

messages.speaker: frontend-specialist
messages.text:
Task(subagent_type="code", prompt="OBJECTIVE: App shell
SCOPE: React shell only
OUT_OF_SCOPE: CSS
OWNERSHIP: src/ui/App.tsx
DEPENDENCIES: none
STEPS: implement shell structure
DELIVERABLES: updated app shell
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: shell changes land in App.tsx
NON-NEGOTIABLE: do not edit CSS
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after shell implementation")

Task(subagent_type="code", prompt="OBJECTIVE: Styles
SCOPE: CSS only
OUT_OF_SCOPE: TSX
OWNERSHIP: src/ui/app.css
DEPENDENCIES: none
STEPS: implement styling
DELIVERABLES: updated CSS
ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA: style changes land in app.css
NON-NEGOTIABLE: do not edit TSX
COMPLETION_CONTRACT: stop after style implementation")
